subcodes.first_line: The Book from Us unto her who, when she heard the Call from the direction of the Throne, turned and affirmed, then cried out "Yea!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی التی اذا سمعت الندآء عن جهه العرش اقبلت و قالت ثم نادت بلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
